sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2193" key="ai)gokeriano/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰγο-κεριανός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n2193.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">born under Capricorn,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).191</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
